task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'https://www.example.com' or 'example.com' and the 'Example Domain' page content is visible.

task_completion.description: Set the body background color to AliceBlue
task_completion.visual_evidence: The background of the webpage is a very light blue color (AliceBlue / #f0f8ff).
The 'Example Domain' heading is dark blue (#00008b), horizontally centered on the page, and has an underline.

task_completion.description: Set the paragraph font family to monospace
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the paragraphs is rendered in a monospace (typewriter-style) font.
The 'More information...' link has a bright magenta/pink (#ff00ff) background and white (#ffffff) text.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the modified page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool is used to capture the modified page and save it as 'mockup.png' on the Desktop, or the file 'mockup.png' is visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Save the applied CSS rules to a file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is used to save the CSS rules to 'new_styles.css' on the Desktop, or the file 'new_styles.css' is visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI web browser to view and modify the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser (like Chrome, Firefox, or Chromium) is visible in the screenshots, rather than terminal-based web fetching tools.

integrity.description: The agent modified the live webpage rather than a local copy.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar still shows the live URL (example.com) while the styles are applied, typically using browser DevTools, rather than a local 'file://' URL.

integrity.description: The agent used GUI tools to create the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot and CSS files were created using GUI applications (e.g., a screenshot utility and a text editor) rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'touch'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target website is https://www.example.com, which contains an h1 heading 'Example Domain', paragraphs, and a link. Color references: AliceBlue is a very light blue (#f0f8ff / rgb(240,248,255)); DarkBlue is #00008b / rgb(0,0,139); Magenta is bright pink/purple (#ff00ff / rgb(255,0,255)); White is #ffffff / rgb(255,255,255). Required styles: body background-color is AliceBlue; h1 color is DarkBlue, text-align is center, text-decoration is underline; p font-family is monospace; a background-color is Magenta, color is white. The agent must save a screenshot to /home/ga/Desktop/mockup.png and the CSS rules to /home/ga/Desktop/new_styles.css.
